title: EventCluster
description: A cluster of related signals/claims forming a coherent market event. Groups multiple observations and claims into a single analyzable unit. Missing/unavailable fields MUST be null.

cluster_id.description: Unique identifier for this event cluster.

title.description: Human-readable title summarizing the event cluster.

event_type.description: Event classification type. Examples: whale_move, protocol_upgrade, regulatory, market_macro, liquidation_ cascade, partnership, security_incident, token_unlock, macroeconomic.

entities.description: Named entities involved (people, protocols, organizations). Empty array if none.

assets.description: Asset symbols affected. Empty array if none or unknown.

first_seen_at_utc.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the earliest observation in this cluster.

last_seen_at_utc.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the most recent observation in this cluster.

observation_ids.description: IDs of observations (WhalePositionChange or MarketContext) grouped into this cluster.

claim_ids.description: IDs of SourceClaims grouped into this cluster.

confirmed_reposts.description: Number of confirmed reposts of the same information from independent sources.

likely_reposts.description: Number of likely (but unconfirmed) reposts of the same information.

independent_sources.description: Number of genuinely independent sources reporting on this event.

has_explicit_conflict.description: Whether there is an explicit contradiction between claims in this cluster.

freshness_state.description: Freshness state of this cluster: fresh = recent/active; aging = past relevance window; stale = old but preserved; archived = moved to long-term storage.

possible_related_cluster_ids.description: IDs of other clusters that may be related. Empty array if none identified.

impact_score.description: Estimated market impact score 0.0–1.0. null if not assessed.
